name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.68: on-site app downloads page. New admin.agvending.is/downloads lists installable app packages (coil kiosk, fridge app) grouped by app newest-first with tap-to-download, so on-site setup does not need a login or a long Drive URL. Gated by a shared access key in the URL (checked against DOWNLOADS_KEY env; fails closed when unset). Registry managed by ag-admin via GET/PUT /api/v1/downloads; files live at their own URLs (GitHub or Drive), the backend stores link and metadata only. HTML output is escaped. Cumulative over v5.67.
